children.text: {{(() => { const d = lidor_performance_stats.data || []; const p = d.reduce((s,r) => s + (r.leads_passed||0), 0); const c = d.reduce((s,r) => s + (r.deals_closed||0), 0); return p > 0 ? Math.round(c/p*100) + '%' : '0%'; })()}}

{{(() => { const d = lidor_performance_stats.data || []; const p = d.reduce((s,r) => s + (r.leads_passed||0), 0)*20; const c = d.reduce((s,r) => s + (r.deals_closed||0), 0)*50; return '₪' + (p+c); })()}}
